title: Anomalous_Advancement
description: A progression-rework mod that overhauls the way tool progression works, and completely changes the enchantment system to be recipe based.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QBHp3GuCV0s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A progression-rework mod that overhauls the way tool progression works, and completely changes the enchantment system to be recipe based.

To install, locate the jar file in the releases tag on the right hand side. Download the jar file and put it in your Minecraft Fabric installation's Mods folder. Include Fabric API dependency.

Only singleplayer has been tested, setup for multiplayer may potentially work, but has not been fully validated.

No major compatibility testing has been done, so add at your own risk to pre-modded worlds.
Confirmed compatible with Essentials Mod.
